building_row.open_questions: Verify whether the exact available unit faces Sunset or a quieter interior/courtyard exposure. Confirm the full recurring monthly stack beyond base rent, including utilities, city rent tax, parking, and any package or amenity charges. Ask how package concierge works after hours and whether guest parking is reliably available.
building_row.notes: 7950 West Sunset is a strong on-paper match for essentials: dishwasher, in-unit washer/dryer, central AC, pool/spa, fitness studio, package concierge, conference/E-lounge work areas, subterranean parking, and pet-friendly terms are all visible in official or major-listing sources. The problem is noise. The address is directly on Sunset Boulevard in a highly active retail and nightlife corridor, and even the official neighborhood page sells the building on being steps from restaurants, shopping, and entertainment rather than on insulation from street activity. Management evidence is thin rather than clearly bad: Legacy Partners is publicly tied to the asset, the official site offers guided tours with on-site staff, and RentCafe shows a positive but very small 4-review signal. Pricing transparency is better than average because the official floor-plan page discloses that displayed prices exclude mandatory charges and the major listing sites publish application and pet fees, but the final fee stack is still not fully self-serve. Given your quiet-first priority, this looks like a unit-specific research_complete building, not a clean tour_candidate, unless a rear-facing stack proves notably insulated from Sunset.

evidence_rows.claim: The official amenities page lists dishwasher, stackable washer and dryer, central air conditioning and heating, infinity-edge pool and spa, fitness studio with yoga loft, executive conference center, E-lounge, package concierge, and private access subterranean parking.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Official page lists apartment and community amenities including dishwasher, stackable washer and dryer, central AC, pool/spa, fitness studio, executive conference center, E-lounge, package concierge, and private access subterranean parking.

evidence_rows.claim: The official floorplan page discloses that displayed monthly prices exclude variable mandatory charges such as insurance, utility services, city rent tax, move fees, and other required charges.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Official fee guide says displayed prices do not include variable mandatory charges required under the lease and that actual charges will appear in the final lease agreement.

evidence_rows.claim: Legacy Partners is publicly identified as the operator or manager for 7950 West Sunset.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: The site footer links to legacypartners.com, and Apartments.com identifies Legacy Partners, Inc. CA DRE #01201696 in the property description.

evidence_rows.claim: Apartments.com shows the property directly at 7950 W Sunset Blvd near multiple shopping centers within a 5-minute walk and highlights a roof terrace, pool, spa, and controlled access.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: The listing places the building on Sunset, notes three shopping centers within 0.3 mile, and emphasizes roof/pool amenities, which supports a strong lifestyle fit but elevated daily activity exposure.

evidence_rows.claim: RentCafe shows a small positive resident signal and current leasing activity, but review depth is thin.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: RentCafe shows 4.5 out of 5 from 4 reviews, only 3 available units, and a March 31 move-in special. The signal is useful but still shallow.

evidence_rows.claim: Public listings publish concrete application and pet-fee terms: $55 application fee, cat deposit $250 with $25 monthly cat rent, and dog deposit $500 with $50 monthly dog rent.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Search result snippet for Realtor.com lists application and pet fee terms and confirms dogs and cats are allowed.

evidence_rows.claim: The official neighborhood page markets the building as steps from dining, shopping, Sunset Strip, and entertainment, which is a convenience plus but a quiet-living risk for street-facing units.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Official copy emphasizes nearby dining, shopping, and entertainment on and around Sunset Boulevard; that supports fit for access but also implies consistent ambient activity.

packet_markdown:
# 7950 West Sunset building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: 7950-west-sunset-7950-w-sunset-blvd
- Address: 7950 W Sunset Blvd, LA 90046
- Primary URL: https://7950westsunset.com/
- Management company: Legacy Partners, Inc.
- Recommended status: research_complete
- Last updated: 2026-03-25

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 2 (medium, evidence count 3)
- Management: 3 (low, evidence count 3)
- Amenity: 5 (high, evidence count 5)
- Community stability: 3 (low, evidence count 2)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 4

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: medium
- Location noise risk: high
- Security risk: medium
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] Official amenities page lists dishwasher, in-unit washer/dryer, central AC, pool/spa, fitness studio, executive conference center, E-lounge, package concierge, and subterranean parking. Source: 7950 West Sunset Amenities (https://7950westsunset.com/amenities/). Note: Official amenity list is strong and directly relevant to your must-haves.
- [official] Official pricing language says displayed rent excludes variable mandatory charges such as insurance, utilities, city rent tax, and move fees. Source: 7950 West Sunset Floorplans (https://7950westsunset.com/floorplans/). Note: Better than average disclosure, but still not a clean all-in fee table.
- [review] Apartments.com places the building directly on Sunset with shopping centers, roof terrace, and pool/spa amenities nearby. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/7950-west-sunset-los-angeles-ca/8h53150/). Note: Great for convenience, but riskier for quiet.
- [review] RentCafe shows a 4.5/5 rating from 4 reviews and 3 available units. Source: RentCafe (https://www.rentcafe.com/apartments/ca/los-angeles/7950-west-sunset-apartments/default.aspx). Note: Positive but shallow resident evidence.
- [review] Realtor.com search snippet publishes application and pet-fee terms. Source: Realtor.com (https://www.realtor.com/realestateandhomes-detail/7950-W-Sunset-Blvd_Los-Angeles_CA_90046_M15213-45219). Note: Useful transparency on pet costs.
- [official] Official neighborhood copy markets proximity to Sunset Strip dining, shopping, and entertainment. Source: 7950 West Sunset Neighborhood (https://7950westsunset.com/neighborhood/). Note: Strong lifestyle access, weaker quiet case.

## Open questions
- Is the exact unit rear-facing or otherwise insulated from Sunset traffic and nightlife?
- What are the full recurring monthly charges beyond base rent, including parking and utilities?
- How does package concierge work after hours and during high-volume delivery days?

## Notes
7950 West Sunset has one of the better amenity sets in this group, but it is not naturally aligned with a quiet-first search unless the available unit sits away from Sunset exposure. That makes unit orientation the make-or-break variable.
